product.name: deploy-to-babou
product.tagline: every merge drafts your launch video

pr.title: Agentic draft pipeline: merge -> Babou draft campaign
pr.body: Wires the deploy to Babou's MCP server. On merge, a headless agent drafts a 3-chapter campaign (What shipped / Why it matters / Try it) and deliberately leaves Export to a human. Ships with a mock MCP server so the whole contract is verifiable with zero credentials.

commit.subject: feat: agentic draft pipeline (#1)
commit.body: Adds the orchestrator, a mock Babou MCP server, contract tests, and the composite GitHub Action.

changelog:
### Added
- Agentic merge->draft pipeline driving Babou's MCP tools.
- Mock MCP server + contract test: full call shape verified with zero credentials.
- Never-export draft invariant enforced in CI.
